### Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you want to request.

### Use Case
Explain why this feature is needed. What problem does it solve?

### Proposed Solution
If you have an idea of how to implement this feature, please describe it here.

### Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
